lastReleaseMessage: Admin-configurable shift options and a full visual polish...

barRaise.topFinding: Sixth consecutive bar-raise, sixth identical core action list, verdict holds at stalled. Nothing has moved since 05-31: git log --since=2026-05-31 is empty, the last commit is still b41b853 (2026-05-29), and the dirty tree is byte-for-byte what 05-30 and 05-31 described. All five carried findings re-verified and hold: Discord webhook still tracked and ungitignored, write-dashboard-status.ps1:82-86 still hardcodes M2, :98-104 still nulls barRaise, DESIGN.md:8 still v0.2.0, DESIGN.md:196 still claims a nonexistent preference_log table. New this cycle: the daily bar-raise is now itself a cost (escalated to a MEDIUM cost-economics finding), spending Opus token budget to re-print a list nobody consumes. Either cut the one-commit v0.3.1 patch that clears the board, or pause the daily Scheduler run until the tree moves.
